text:
(sending this again as -gnats-submit didn't get it due to missing
"ports/32282: " from the title of pr as presented on web, thus
missing from subject of previous mail.)

this pr, 32282, can be closed as error message is not generated
anymore.  it is due to addition of "Silent" command (in v2.4.6).

--
